data.body:
Epic 2 UX settled (HCD critique -> finding-centric redesign).

An HCD designer subagent critiqued the proposed pass-centric design (gate-tabs + four-pass vertical
stepper + nested accordions). Core finding: it optimized for displaying the data model (the four
passes) over answering the auditor's question; pass-3 detail was 4-5 clicks deep and forced the user
to mentally join a finding across four panes. Redesign adopted (primary users = auditor AND
gate-debugger; verdict-first, provenance-on-demand):

- FINDING is the atomic unit; the four passes become each finding's expandable in-place provenance
  (FIND -> VERIFY -> DECIDE -> COACH). No per-pass navigation, no id cross-referencing.
- Gate-status STRIP: all three verdicts (plan/completion/code) shown at once (pass/fail in zero
  clicks); detail stacks below, worst-first. Replaces exclusive gate tabs.
- Findings grouped by DECISION (blocking open by default; advisory/dropped/indeterminate collapsed +
  counted), sorted by priority. Replaces the stepper.
- Completion is criterion-centric: one row per AC (met glyph + kind + citation); AC checklist lives
  in the completion panel (not a persistent left rail); operator-attested-without-attestation flagged.
- Single-column stacking (narrow width / 200% zoom reflow). Compact collapsible ticket header.
- Accessible severity encoding (glyph + label + color, never color-only). Trust signals (gate/model
  version, timestamp, round's own block_threshold, signed state) in each round header.

User-directed additions on top of the baseline:
- Per-round CONVERGENCE LINE GRAPH (inline SVG): counts of blocking/advisory/dropped/indeterminate
  across rounds, 4 colored+shape-distinguished+labelled series -> shows whether review cycles
  converged. Replaces the per-finding gauge.
- Threshold shown as a SIGNED, color-coded delta-from-threshold per finding (priority - block_threshold):
  green when >= 0 (finding cleared the bar; +0.00 green), red when below; two-decimal precision.
  Framed as finding strength; decision chip carries the actual block/advisory outcome.

TICKET: story G ff6f-b655-4058-4308 (depressant-amethyst-wasp) rewritten (title + description +
file_impact) to this design. Story F (server scaffolding) unaffected. Plan-review gate still deferred
until ready to gate Epic 2.
